outcome_record.event_name: Autumn Internationals 2027 — Ireland vs New Zealand (Dublin)

prediction.pre_match_note: Autumn Int. Ireland vs All Blacks in Dublin. Ireland home at Aviva Stadium (51,700). Ireland ranked #1 globally (2027). Kicker: Sexton-era successor confirmed elite. Set piece: Ireland lineout 91%. All Blacks traditional quality but touring side.

calibration_flags.notes: 13th athlete_modifier record. Ireland #1 ranked vs touring All Blacks. Home advantage + elite kicker + dominant lineout correctly combined into athlete_modifier ×1.08. Ireland global #1 status correctly overrides traditional All Blacks quality advantage when touring.
